name: Keepers of ancient lands
short_description: ou are one of the defenders of ancient lands. In this game, you have to destroy crowds of enemies with the help of your faithful warriors.
detailed_description:
You are one of the defenders of ancient lands. In this game, you have to destroy crowds of enemies with the help of your faithful warriors. Place your soldiers along the roads to attack the enemy. There are several types of soldiers, some attack close, some from far away, others poison the enemy, and there are those that increase the damage of nearby soldiers... Enemies also come in different types, some try to run past your soldiers faster so that they do not have time to attack them, others after Deaths create small copies of themselves, all of them are very dangerous. Build walls in the enemy's path to delay him. Place your soldiers wisely and you will win!

-Dynamic gameplay
-Many enemies
-Interesting gameplay
